open_findings: R1: Pricing completely absent (7 weeks unresolved)

R5: No competitive positioning vs Canva/Napkin AI
R6: 12 inline styles bypass design token system

Y5: No pre-commit hooks or CI/CD pipeline
Y7: 19 hardcoded hex colors in data arrays
Y8: Advanced styles no visual preview
Y9: Hick's Law — 27+ controls in generator
Y10: No documentation or help resources
Y12: Dark theme only — no light toggle
